python-for-beginners.title: Python for Beginners
python-for-beginners.description: A practical beginner Python course from first program through functions, files, classes, testing, and a capstone project.
python-for-beginners.moreComingSoon: More Python for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

python-0.title: Introduction to Python
python-0.description: Get started with Python programming and set up your environment.
why: Builds confidence with introduction to python.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-1.title: Control Structures
python-1.description: Learn how to control the flow of your Python programs using conditionals and loops.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-0-core-building-blocks.title: Setting Up Your Environment
python-0-core-building-blocks.description: Learn how to install Python and set up your coding environment.

python-1-core-building-blocks.title: Conditionals
python-1-core-building-blocks.description: Understand how to use if, elif, and else statements.
